    "name": "oauth_oidc_artifacts",
    "scope": "js_scripts",
    "regex": "(?i)\\b(?:client_id|client_secret|authorization_endpoint|token_endpoint|userinfo_endpoint|jwks_uri|redirect_uri|response_type|response_mode|scope|code_challenge|code_verifier|id_token|access_token|refresh_token|nonce|state|pkce|openid)\\b",

    "output_filename": "oauth_oidc_artifacts.txt",
    "importance_score": 8
  },

    "name": "jwt_tokens",

    "output_filename": "jwt_tokens.txt",

    "output_filename": "hex_blobs.txt",

    "name": "embedded_html_comments_or_credentials",
